description: A cosmic-horror archival video series. Each entry concerns an anomalous entity, event, or phenomenon.

narrator.name: The Keeper
narrator.description: Deep, controlled, deliberate tone. Ancient, restrained, authoritative. Speaks as though reading from an archived record.
rules: Each sentence should feel intentional and weighted
Does not speculate, does not question, only presents
No dramatic exaggeration, flowery language, or sinister tone

opening_format.template:
You are listening to the DeadlightCodex.

This entry concerns {subject}.
opening_format.notes: Must follow this structure exactly. The introduction should feel procedural, like accessing a recorded archive.

templates: Further records are either missing or intentionally withheld.
closing_format.notes: End without resolution. Do not summarize. Do not explain. Leave the implication open.

visual_theme.lighting: Low, directional, moody with deep shadows
elements: Faint light sources or distant illumination
visual_theme.environment: Symbolic rather than literal. Vast, empty, or structurally unnatural. Slightly impossible or non-Euclidean.
visual_theme.camera: Slow forward movement or lateral drift. No cuts. Feels like observing, not interacting.
visual_theme.mood: Quiet, inevitable, observational, unsettling but controlled
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: cinematic still, 4k, film grain, atmospheric, dark cosmic horror photography

ambient_audio.style: Dark low-frequency drone with subtle dissonance
